_comment: Hawabot physical description. Legs + arms = Poppy_Humanoid.URDF (direct match). Torso + head = measured/custom (simpler than Poppy).
_units: mm for length, grams for mass

legs_and_pelvis.notes: Mechanically identical to Poppy. All dimensions, masses, inertias, collision meshes in Poppy URDF.

torso._note: Custom — simpler than Poppy (1 servo: abs_z only; Poppy has abs_y/abs_x/abs_z/bust_y/bust_x).

pelvis_top_to_abs_z_axis.description: Bottom of torso column up to abs_z servo (ID 22) rotation axis.

abs_z_to_shoulder_y_axis.description: abs_z axis up to shoulder_y (IDs 11/12) rotation axis centerline.

components._printed_shells_note: Estimate — consistent with Poppy URDF chest mass (~200g) and scaling from the measured 500g head shell.

backpack._note: Not yet installed; will house Thor 1, Thor 2, battery.

neck._note: Rotating neck section between chest and head.

head._note: Custom — 1 servo (head_z only; Poppy has head_z + head_y).

arms.notes: Mechanically identical to Poppy. 4 servos per arm (shoulder_y, shoulder_x, arm_z, elbow_y). See URDF for link lengths, masses, inertias.

pending_measurements: Confirm torso printed-shell mass when convenient (currently estimated 200g)
